concerns.text: FR-010 requires extracting confounders (age, gender, baseline severity, prior therapy) from a supplied demographics file, but no task exists for parsing/validating the demographics input file. T025 handles imputation, T029 includes confounders in regression, but demographics ingestion is missing.
SC-001 requires a benchmark dataset of ≥100 sessions for measurement, but no task creates or specifies this benchmark dataset. T054 only references 'sample data' without the ≥100 session requirement.

SC-002 requires a hand-crafted ground-truth subset of ≥50 users for validation, but no task creates or specifies this ground-truth dataset. T020 validates metric calculation but doesn't address ground-truth creation.
SC-004 requires validation on 'the validation subset' but does not specify selection criteria, sample size, or how the subset is constructed. No task addresses validation subset specification.
Edge Cases specify 'All sessions have identical agency scores (zero variance)' requiring pipeline abort, but no dedicated task implements this zero-variance detection and abort behavior.

FR-009 requires validation against an 'established perceived agency/autonomy scale' but no task sources or ingests this external validation dataset. T038 computes correlation but doesn't specify where the external scale data comes from.
Constitution Principle VI requires consent documentation stored under `data/` with explicit linkage to participant data processing. No task addresses consent document handling or linkage.
